# ManagedApplicationFeedbackCommand

**Device Management Command**

The command to get app feedback from a managed app on the device.

## Declaration

```swift
object ManagedApplicationFeedbackCommand
```

## Objects

- **ManagedApplicationFeedbackCommand.Command**: The command to get app feedback from a managed app on the device.

## Commands and responses

- **ManagedApplicationFeedbackResponse**: A response from the device after it processes the command to get app feedback from a managed app on the device.
